howItWorks.title: How E-SEOMAX Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Our AI-powered SEO analysis platform makes it easy to understand and improve your website's search engine visibility. Follow these simple steps to unlock your site's full potential.

step1.title: Enter Your Website URL
step1.description: Simply paste your website URL into our analyzer. Our system accepts any public website—whether it's your homepage, a specific page, or a competitor's site you want to analyze.
details: No registration required for basic analysis
Supports all website types: e-commerce, blogs, corporate sites
Check individual pages or entire domains

step2.title: AI-Powered Analysis
step2.description: Our advanced AI engine crawls your website and performs a comprehensive analysis across 50+ SEO factors. The process is fast, thorough, and based on the latest search engine guidelines.
details: Meta tags and structured data analysis

step3.title: Issue Identification
step3.description: We identify all SEO issues affecting your website's search visibility, from critical errors that need immediate attention to minor improvements that can boost your rankings.

step4.title: Score & Metrics
step4.description: Receive a comprehensive SEO score from 0-100 along with detailed metrics for each category. Compare your performance against industry benchmarks and track improvements over time.

step5.title: Actionable Recommendations
step5.description: Get step-by-step, actionable recommendations tailored to your website. Each suggestion includes clear instructions and explains the potential impact on your rankings.

accuracy.title: AI-Powered Accuracy
accuracy.description: Our machine learning algorithms are trained on millions of data points to provide insights that match what search engines actually care about. No guesswork—just data-driven recommendations.

insights.title: Actionable Insights
insights.description: We don't just identify problems—we tell you exactly how to fix them. Each recommendation comes with step-by-step instructions that anyone can follow, regardless of technical expertise.

upToDate.title: Always Up-to-Date
upToDate.description: Search engine algorithms change constantly. Our platform is continuously updated to reflect the latest best practices, ensuring your SEO strategy stays current and effective.

cta.title: Ready to Improve Your SEO?
cta.description: Join thousands of website owners who trust E-SEOMAX to optimize their search visibility. Get started with a free analysis today—no credit card required.

howItWorks.disclaimer: SEO results vary based on many factors including competition, content quality, and implementation. E-SEOMAX provides analysis and recommendations but does not guarantee specific rankings or outcomes.
